ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviation code for the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the monitoring station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the monitoring station */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the states table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_quality_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air quality record */,
  "measure_date" TEXT /* Date of the air quality measurement */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the monitoring_stations table */,
  "no2_mean" REAL /* Mean value of Nitrogen Dioxide (NO2) in the air */,
  "o3_mean" REAL /* Mean value of Ozone (O3) in the air */,
  "so2_mean" REAL /* Mean value of Sulfur Dioxide (SO2) in the air */,
  "co_mean" REAL /* Mean value of Carbon Monoxide (CO) in the air */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the measurement */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the measurement */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, public) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the monitoring_stations table */,
  "data_access" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user has access to the station's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the air_quality_data table */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meteorological_data" (
  "meteorological_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meteorological data record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the air_quality_data table */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the measurement */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the measurement */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meteorological_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the air_quality_data table */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Contents of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
